titleStmt.title: SII 24.35: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 35. (A.R. No. 6 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Damaged. Sale of land to Āritaṉ Tiruvāykkulamuḍaiyāṉ Śī(Śrī)rāghavaṉ by Aḻagiya Maṇavāḷa-Nambi and another.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svasti śrī . pukaḻcūḻnta puṇa] ri Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu varaicar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittu toḷ vali kāṭṭip poṟ pari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti tenticait temarukamalap pūmakaḷ
tanimaiyun tavirntu punitaṟṟiru muṭiyā ntar cūṭa muṉai maṉuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟup pac ceṅkol ticaitoṟum cella veṇkuṭai viḷākam Eṅkaṇun=taṉātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Oru tanimeruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa pūpālar tiṟai viṭu tantu kalañcori
ṉnavan karun=talai parun=talaittiṭat taṉ pe piḻai Eṉṉuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā vikkalan lūr naṭuveṉat tuṅkapattirai pukka paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭ Eṟiṉa malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa
netikaḷ cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷuntalaivirittalamara peruntiruvum paḻi niraiyuṅ kaṅka maṇṭalamuñ ciṅ pāṇi Iraṇṭum maṇṭalam ko
porupari tantiravāriyum poruta Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭip paṭuttuk maṟṟavar tammai va meṟṟik koṟṟa vijaiyasta toṟu ni
neṟi toṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi tiṟai koḷ tiriyaviṭṭaruḷi tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum poliya vira mun yāṇṭu Āva ṇabhaṭṭar Ēval paṭi ṉamātevi Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷanampiyum
periya koyil yaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivviruvom Āritan tiruvāykkula muṭaiyān cirākavannukku Avakaḷ Aṭuttuk kuṭutta nilam Āḻvār devatāṉa keraḷa ḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭu kaṟka
caitta kiḻ pākkel viḷainilam nānūṟṟuva vacakkalukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai tirumārviṭaṅkoṇṭān vacakkalukku vaṭakkum nilakaṅka viḷā kattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
ku meṟkum ka paḻuvūr nilattukku kiḻakkum nilakaṅka viḷākat tukku teṟkum Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam Araikkālum I ṟukku nīrpāyum(yum) vākkāl
ku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai ṭaiyāṉ vacak kallukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunānkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa viḷainilam ṟumā kāṇiyum maṟutanilam Ēḻumākkāṇiyum [ tirunan=ta- vāṉappuṟa]
vittu viḷaikiṟa nilattukku puṉcey varicai yāl Aḷakkiṟa nellu veli kalamāka Innilattāl vaṉta nellu patiṉ Oru kalaney Aiṅkuṟuṇiyum Āḻvār paṇṭārattey paḷḷi koṇṭān marakkālāley kār pātiyum pacā
nūṟṟuvatātanukkum Ivan vaṟkkattārum Ittirunanta vānam ceyyakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Innilam tiruttaṟa tiruttumaḷavum viḷainta ṉcey varicai Aḷa ttāl van=ta An=tarāya
tan tiruvāykulamuṭaiyān cirākavanukku Āḻ vār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku śrīvaiyiṣṇavakkaṇakku veṅkaṭavan tiruvāykku tu Ippaṭikku Ivai ṇakku veṅkaṭa vanāta periyakoyil
Digital edition of SII 24.35 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
